🔊 英语日常用语 3000 词

点击 🔊 收听发音 · 支持手机 / 电脑 · 共 3000 条

共 3000 条短语
Hello
/həˈləʊ/
你好
Hello, how are you today?
Good morning
/ɡʊd ˈmɔːnɪŋ/
早上好
Good morning! Did you sleep well?
Good afternoon
/ɡʊd ˌɑːftəˈnuːn/
下午好
Good afternoon! How's your day going?
Good evening
/ɡʊd ˈiːvnɪŋ/
晚上好
Good evening! Nice to see you.
Good night
/ɡʊd naɪt/
晚安
Good night, sleep tight!
How are you?
/haʊ ɑː juː/
你好吗？
How are you? I'm fine, thank you.
What's your name?
/wɒts jɔː neɪm/
你叫什么名字？
What's your name? My name is John.
Nice to meet you
/naɪs tuː miːt juː/
很高兴见到你
Nice to meet you! I've heard a lot about you.
How do you do?
/haʊ duː juː duː/
你好（正式）
How do you do? I'm pleased to meet you.
Long time no see
/lɒŋ taɪm nəʊ siː/
好久不见
Long time no see! How have you been?
I'm hungry
/aɪm ˈhʌŋɡri/
我饿了
I'm hungry. Let's get something to eat.
I'm thirsty
/aɪm ˈθɜːsti/
我渴了
I'm thirsty. Could I have some water?
I'm tired
/aɪm ˈtaɪəd/
我累了
I'm tired. I need to rest for a while.
I'm busy
/aɪm ˈbɪzi/
我很忙
I'm busy right now. Can we talk later?
Let's go
/lets ɡəʊ/
我们走吧
Let's go! The movie starts in 10 minutes.
Wait a minute
/weɪt ə ˈmɪnɪt/
等一下
Wait a minute, I need to grab my keys.
Excuse me
/ɪkˈskjuːz miː/
打扰一下
Excuse me, could you tell me the time?
Thank you
/θæŋk juː/
谢谢
Thank you for your help.
You're welcome
/jɔː ˈwelkəm/
不客气
You're welcome! Happy to help.
I'm sorry
/aɪm ˈsɒri/
对不起
I'm sorry for being late.
I'd like to order
/aɪd laɪk tuː ˈɔːdə/
我想点餐
I'd like to order the steak, please.
What do you recommend?
/wɒt duː juː ˌrekəˈmend/
你推荐什么？
What do you recommend? The chef's special is excellent.
Check, please
/tʃek pliːz/
请结账
Check, please. Could we have the bill?
It's delicious
/ɪts dɪˈlɪʃəs/
很好吃
This cake is delicious! Did you make it?
I'm full
/aɪm fʊl/
我饱了
I'm full. I can't eat another bite.
Can I have the menu?
/kæn aɪ hæv ðə ˈmenjuː/
我可以看一下菜单吗？
Can I have the menu? I'd like to see the desserts.
I'm allergic to
/aɪm əˈlɜːdʒɪk tuː/
我对...过敏
I'm allergic to peanuts.
Well done
/wel dʌn/
全熟
I'd like my steak well done, please.
Medium rare
/ˈmiːdiəm reə/
三分熟
Medium rare is perfect for this cut.
No ice, please
/nəʊ aɪs pliːz/
请不加冰
No ice, please. I prefer my drink without ice.
How much is this?
/haʊ mʌtʃ ɪz ðɪs/
这个多少钱？
How much is this shirt? I really like it.
Do you have this in another color?
/duː juː hæv ðɪs ɪn əˈnʌðə ˈkʌlə/
这个有其他颜色吗？
Do you have this in another color? Maybe in blue?
Can I try this on?
/kæn aɪ traɪ ðɪs ɒn/
我可以试穿吗？
Can I try this on? Where is the fitting room?
It's too expensive
/ɪts tuː ɪkˈspensɪv/
太贵了
It's too expensive. Do you have anything cheaper?
I'll take it
/aɪl teɪk ɪt/
我要买这个
I'll take it! Can you wrap it as a gift?
Do you accept credit cards?
/duː juː əkˈsept ˈkredɪt kɑːdz/
你们接受信用卡吗？
Do you accept credit cards? I don't have cash.
Is there a discount?
/ɪz ðeər ə ˈdɪskaʊnt/
有折扣吗？
Is there a discount for students?
This doesn't fit
/ðɪs ˈdʌznt fɪt/
这个不合适
This doesn't fit. Do you have a larger size?
Can I get a refund?
/kæn aɪ ɡet ə ˈriːfʌnd/
我可以退款吗？
Can I get a refund? I lost the receipt.
When does the sale end?
/wen dʌz ðə seɪl end/
促销什么时候结束？
When does the sale end? I might come back later.
Where is the train station?
/weər ɪz ðə treɪn ˈsteɪʃən/
火车站在哪里？
Where is the train station? I need to catch a train.
How do I get to
/haʊ duː aɪ ɡet tuː/
我怎样才能到达...
How do I get to the airport from here?
Is this seat taken?
/ɪz ðɪs siːt ˈteɪkən/
这个座位有人吗？
Is this seat taken? No, please sit down.
I'd like to book a room
/aɪd laɪk tuː bʊk ə ruːm/
我想预订一个房间
I'd like to book a room for two nights.
What time is check-in?
/wɒt taɪm ɪz tʃek ɪn/
什么时候可以入住？
What time is check-in? 2 PM is perfect.
Can you recommend a good restaurant?
/kæn juː ˌrekəˈmend ə ɡʊd ˈrestrɒnt/
你能推荐一家好餐厅吗？
Can you recommend a good restaurant nearby?
I'm lost
/aɪm lɒst/
我迷路了
I'm lost. Can you show me on the map?
Which platform does the train leave from?
/wɪtʃ ˈplætfɔːm dʌz ðə treɪn liːv frɒm/
火车从哪个站台出发？
Which platform does the train leave from? Platform 3, thank you.
One-way ticket
/wʌn weɪ ˈtɪkɪt/
单程票
I'd like a one-way ticket to London.
Round-trip ticket
/raʊnd trɪp ˈtɪkɪt/
往返票
A round-trip ticket is cheaper than two one-ways.
I'm here for the interview
/aɪm hɪə fɔː ðə ˈɪntəvjuː/
我来面试
I'm here for the interview with Mr. Smith.
Could you send me the report?
/kʊd juː send miː ðə rɪˈpɔːt/
你能把报告发给我吗？
Could you send me the report by email?
When is the deadline?
/wen ɪz ðə ˈdedlaɪn/
截止日期是什么时候？
When is the deadline? Friday at 5 PM.
Let's schedule a meeting
/lets ˈʃedjuːl ə ˈmiːtɪŋ/
我们安排个会议吧
Let's schedule a meeting for next week.
I agree with you
/aɪ əˈɡriː wɪð juː/
我同意你
I agree with you. That's a good point.
I have a different opinion
/aɪ hæv ə ˈdɪfrənt əˈpɪnjən/
我有不同意见
I have a different opinion on this matter.
Could you explain that again?
/kʊd juː ɪkˈspleɪn ðæt əˈɡen/
你能再解释一遍吗？
Could you explain that again? I didn't quite understand.
Thank you for your time
/θæŋk juː fɔː jɔː taɪm/
感谢您的时间
Thank you for your time. I appreciate the opportunity.
I'll follow up with you
/aɪl ˈfɒləʊ ʌp wɪð juː/
我会跟进
I'll follow up with you next week.
Looking forward to working with you
/ˈlʊkɪŋ ˈfɔːwəd tuː ˈwɜːkɪŋ wɪð juː/
期待与您合作
Looking forward to working with you on this project.
What does this word mean?
/wɒt dʌz ðɪs wɜːd miːn/
这个单词是什么意思？
What does this word mean? I've never seen it before.
Could you repeat that?
/kʊd juː rɪˈpiːt ðæt/
你能重复一遍吗？
Could you repeat that? I missed what you said.
I don't understand
/aɪ dəʊnt ˌʌndəˈstænd/
我不明白
I don't understand. Could you explain it differently?
Let me think about it
/let miː θɪŋk əˈbaʊt ɪt/
让我想想
Let me think about it. I need some time to decide.
That's interesting
/ðæts ˈɪntrəstɪŋ/
真有趣
That's interesting! I never thought about it that way.
I don't feel well
/aɪ dəʊnt fiːl wel/
我感觉不舒服
I don't feel well. I think I have a fever.
I need to see a doctor
/aɪ niːd tuː siː ə ˈdɒktə/
我需要看医生
I need to see a doctor. My stomach hurts.
Take care of yourself
/teɪk keər əv jɔːˈself/
照顾好自己
Take care of yourself. Get plenty of rest.
Get well soon
/ɡet wel suːn/
早日康复
Get well soon! I hope you feel better.
I have a headache
/aɪ hæv ə ˈhedeɪk/
我头疼
I have a headache. Do you have any painkillers?
What's your favorite movie?
/wɒts jɔː ˈfeɪvərɪt ˈmuːvi/
你最喜欢的电影是什么？
What's your favorite movie? Mine is The Godfather.
Let's watch a movie
/lets wɒtʃ ə ˈmuːvi/
我们看电影吧
Let's watch a movie tonight. What do you want to see?
I love music
/aɪ lʌv ˈmjuːzɪk/
我喜欢音乐
I love music. What kind of music do you like?
That sounds fun
/ðæt saʊndz fʌn/
听起来很有趣
That sounds fun! I'd love to join you.
Have a good time
/hæv ə ɡʊd taɪm/
玩得开心
Have a good time at the party!
Call the police
/kɔːl ðə pəˈliːs/
报警
Call the police! There's been an accident.
I need help
/aɪ niːd help/
我需要帮助
I need help! Can someone call an ambulance?
Where is the hospital?
/weər ɪz ðə ˈhɒspɪtəl/
医院在哪里？
Where is the nearest hospital? It's an emergency.
Be careful
/biː ˈkeəfəl/
小心
Be careful! The floor is wet and slippery.
Watch out
/wɒtʃ aʊt/
注意
Watch out! There's a car coming.
I miss you
/aɪ mɪs juː/
我想你
I miss you. When are you coming back?
I love you
/aɪ lʌv juː/
我爱你
I love you more than anything in the world.
Let's stay in touch
/lets steɪ ɪn tʌtʃ/
保持联系
Let's stay in touch even after you move.
You're special to me
/jɔː ˈspeʃəl tuː miː/
你对我来说很特别
You're special to me. I value our friendship.
Thanks for being there for me
/θæŋks fɔː ˈbiːɪŋ ðeə fɔː miː/
感谢你一直在我身边
Thanks for being there for me when I needed you.
What time is it?
/wɒt taɪm ɪz ɪt/
现在几点了？
What time is it? I need to catch my train.
What day is today?
/wɒt deɪ ɪz təˈdeɪ/
今天是星期几？
What day is today? It's Monday, the start of a new week.
What's the date?
/wɒts ðə deɪt/
今天是几号？
What's the date? It's March 15th.
See you later
/siː juː ˈleɪtə/
回头见
See you later! Have a great day.
See you tomorrow
/siː juː təˈmɒrəʊ/
明天见
See you tomorrow at the same time.
What's the weather like?
/wɒts ðə ˈweðə laɪk/
天气怎么样？
What's the weather like outside? Is it raining?
It's sunny today
/ɪts ˈsʌni təˈdeɪ/
今天阳光明媚
It's sunny today. Perfect weather for a picnic.
It's raining
/ɪts ˈreɪnɪŋ/
下雨了
It's raining. Don't forget your umbrella.
It's cold
/ɪts kəʊld/
天气冷
It's cold today. You should wear a coat.
It's hot
/ɪts hɒt/
天气热
It's hot. Let's go somewhere with air conditioning.
What's your email?
/wɒts jɔː ˈiːmeɪl/
你的邮箱是什么？
What's your email? I'll send you the details.
Can you add me on WeChat?
/kæn juː æd miː ɒn wiː tʃæt/
你能加我微信吗？
Can you add me on WeChat? My ID is ABC123.
I'll text you
/aɪl tekst juː/
我会发信息给你
I'll text you the address when I get there.
Check your phone
/tʃek jɔː fəʊn/
看看你的手机
Check your phone. I just sent you a message.
The internet is slow
/ði ˈɪntənet ɪz sləʊ/
网速很慢
The internet is slow today. It's taking forever to load.
I'm happy
/aɪm ˈhæpi/
我很开心
I'm happy to see you again after so long.
I'm excited
/aɪm ɪkˈsaɪtɪd/
我很兴奋
I'm excited about our trip next week!
I'm worried
/aɪm ˈwʌrid/
我很担心
I'm worried about the test tomorrow.
I'm nervous
/aɪm ˈnɜːvəs/
我很紧张
I'm nervous about giving the presentation.
I'm proud of you
/aɪm praʊd əv juː/
我为你骄傲
I'm proud of you for finishing the project.
I'm busy
/aɪm ˈbɪzi/
我很忙
I'm busy is an important phrase to learn.
It's hot
/ɪts hɒt/
天气热
I often use It's hot when talking to friends.
Do you accept credit cards?
/duː juː əkˈsept ˈkredɪt kɑːdz/
你们接受信用卡吗？
Do you accept credit cards? is very useful in daily conversation.

I love music is very useful in daily conversation.

I often use What time is it? when talking to friends.

Do you know how to say I'll text you in English?

I often use That sounds fun when talking to friends.

Watch out is an important phrase to learn.

早上好
Do you know how to say Good morning in English?
How are you?
/haʊ ɑː juː/
你好吗？
Let's practice saying How are you? together.
Looking forward to working with you
/ˈlʊkɪŋ ˈfɔːwəd tuː ˈwɜːkɪŋ wɪð juː/
期待与您合作
Looking forward to working with you is very useful in daily conversation.
I have a headache
/aɪ hæv ə ˈhedeɪk/
我头疼
I often use I have a headache when talking to friends.
It's cold
/ɪts kəʊld/
天气冷
Let's practice saying It's cold together.
What's the date?
/wɒts ðə deɪt/
今天是几号？
I often use What's the date? when talking to friends.
Take care of yourself
/teɪk keər əv jɔːˈself/
照顾好自己
Do you know how to say Take care of yourself in English?
I need help
/aɪ niːd help/
我需要帮助
Let's practice saying I need help together.
Good evening
/ɡʊd ˈiːvnɪŋ/
晚上好
I often use Good evening when talking to friends.
I miss you
/aɪ mɪs juː/
我想你
I often use I miss you when talking to friends.
That sounds fun
/ðæt saʊndz fʌn/
听起来很有趣
Let's practice saying That sounds fun together.
Can you recommend a good restaurant?
/kæn juː ˌrekəˈmend ə ɡʊd ˈrestrɒnt/
你能推荐一家好餐厅吗？
Do you know how to say Can you recommend a good restaurant? in English?
Excuse me
/ɪkˈskjuːz miː/
打扰一下
Excuse me is an important phrase to learn.
It's sunny today
/ɪts ˈsʌni təˈdeɪ/
今天阳光明媚
Do you know how to say It's sunny today in English?
I'm allergic to
/aɪm əˈlɜːdʒɪk tuː/
我对...过敏
Do you know how to say I'm allergic to in English?
I'd like to order
/aɪd laɪk tuː ˈɔːdə/
我想点餐
I often use I'd like to order when talking to friends.
I'm full
/aɪm fʊl/
我饱了
Let's practice saying I'm full together.
What's the weather like?
/wɒts ðə ˈweðə laɪk/
天气怎么样？
I often use What's the weather like? when talking to friends.
Can I get a refund?
/kæn aɪ ɡet ə ˈriːfʌnd/
我可以退款吗？
Can I get a refund? is an important phrase to learn.
I'm tired
/aɪm ˈtaɪəd/
我累了
I'm tired is very useful in daily conversation.
Could you explain that again?
/kʊd juː ɪkˈspleɪn ðæt əˈɡen/
你能再解释一遍吗？
I often use Could you explain that again? when talking to friends.

/aɪ hæv ə ˈdɪfrənt əˈpɪnjən/

Do you know how to say I have a different opinion in English?
I don't understand
/aɪ dəʊnt ˌʌndəˈstænd/
我不明白
Do you know how to say I don't understand in English?

/kæn aɪ ɡet ə ˈriːfʌnd/
我可以退款吗？
Can I get a refund? is very useful in daily conversation.

/wɒts ðə ˈweðə laɪk/

/lets wɒtʃ ə ˈmuːvi/
我们看电影吧
Let's watch a movie is very useful in daily conversation.

I often use I'm lost when talking to friends.

/aɪm fʊl/
